vBRIEFInfo.description: Story vBRIEF for #1293 (feat(vbrief): scripts/vbrief_crud.py); part of the #742 decomposition.

plan.title: scripts/vbrief_crud.py -- typed CRUD tool for vBRIEF JSON

narratives.Description: Build the deterministic CRUD tool. Round-trip-preserving writes, schema-validation-on-the-spot, byte-stable output. Foundation of Epic 2; the rest of Epic 2's children depend on it.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: Typed entry points (create, read, update, delete). Schema-validate via existing vbrief_validate.py. Deterministic JSON encoder configuration. Path-based addressing for nested fields. Architecture per #1167.
narratives.UserStory: As an agent editing a vBRIEF, I want a typed CRUD surface so I don't 'innovate' within the structure and so writes round-trip cleanly.

narrative.Acceptance: Typed Python functions; path-based addressing works on nested fields.
Read-write-read produces identical bytes; no key reordering or whitespace drift.
Invalid mutations fail at the CRUD boundary, not downstream.

items.title: Tests for happy-path, schema-rejection, non-ASCII, large-file, concurrent-edit
